name: Pyre Archer
tips: Pyre Archer applies burn on every attack at range 2. Over multiple turns, the burn damage stacks and can outpace the direct attack damage.
Only obtainable via Reanimated Bones transform (1+2 = 3 mana total). This is the cheapest transform option and gets burn pressure online fastest.
At 9/5, Pyre Archer is fragile. Keep it in the back row behind a tanky minion — its range 2 means it can attack from two rows away.
Pair with Emberplague Rat for a double burn strategy. Targets caught between both will take end-of-turn burn + on-attack burn simultaneously.
As an Archer and Undead, it shares tribal tags with both ranged and undead synergies. The dual tribe may become more relevant as new cards are added.
rulings: Burn is a boolean status (on/off), not a stack count. Hitting an already-burning target applies nothing extra; the target still just ticks for 5 🤍 at the start of its owner's next turn.
Burn persists until the minion dies — it does not expire after one tick.
If YOU control a Flame Wyrm, your burns on enemy minions tick for 6 🤍 instead of 5. Two Flame Wyrms stack for 7 🤍 ticks.
Target can still die to burn on the owner's next-turn start even after surviving the attack exchange.
